To connect to eduroam WiFi at the Bundoora campus, follow these steps:

Ensure your device is within range of an eduroam access point.
Open your wireless network settings on your device.
Select "eduroam" from the list of available networks.
You will be prompted to enter your La Trobe University username and password.
Once authenticated, you should be connected to the eduroam network.
If you encounter any issues, you can contact the IT support team for assistance.
